mentions.note: Steel peer mentioned alongside Steel Dynamics as beneficiary of US strength and tariff support; Cramer likes the two of them together.
Best steel company in world; pre-announced strong earnings, up 12% since; buy on any Monday dip given Fed rate cuts and tariffs.
Mixed quarter but stock at 52-week high; protected by steel tariffs blocking foreign dumping; CEO Topalian credits very supportive pro-manufacturing trade environment.
Steel/metals pure-play; had another great session. Cramer sees path to $200. Recommends NUE over CMC for mid-cap industrial transformation play.
Tremendous steelmaker, best industrial in market. Hope for price pullback on earnings; rarely gives one.

Record shipments, 21% sales growth, $20B capex payoff underway; diverse end-market exposure (data centers, reshoring, semiconductors, military steel) and tariff moat; still undervalued despite 90% YoY gains.
